programmes.show_description: At Unity at Brean Sands in Somerset, the reception crew have one team member more than they bargained for: a lost dog without a collar has found its way behind the check-in desk.
It's summer in the sunny South West and hundreds of thousands of Brits swarm to this holiday honeypot for the perfect family getaway.
Arthur starts his walk at St Paul's Cathedral, which became the iconic symbol of the blitz, before learning how the blackout affected London's nightlife.

When part-time sleuth Jessica goes to Atlanta to judge a writing competition, her hotel room is mistaken for that of an international arms dealer.
As she works on her annual book show for a San Francisco talk radio station, Jessica Fletcher is called on to investigate the murder of a controversial radio presenter's manager.
...Part 1. First episode of the classic series. Writer Jessica Fletcher goes to New York to publicise a book, only to be confronted with a murder.
...Part 2. Jessica Fletcher continues to investigate the death of a private detective found floating in her publisher's swimming pool.
When Jessica investigates the strange murder of wealthy Stephen Earl, suspicion falls on the four daughters who stand to make a fortune from his death.
Jessica sees a family wedding turn into a murder investigation with the bridegroom as the prime suspect.
Jessica's trip to Hollywood turns to disaster when she becomes the prime suspect in a movie mogul's murder.
Jessica visits her cousin at a country estate but while she is there the owner of the house dies in strange circumstances during a hunt.
While lecturing in Seattle, Jessica refuses to believe her new secretary is a killer, despite the evidence.
On a day out, Jessica is asked to solve the seemingly impossible murder of a wealthy and much-disliked amusement park owner.
Exploring the world's five strangest ghost towns - now abandoned ruins shrouded in mystery. Each haunted shell will be unmasked to tell its unique story.

programmes.show_name: New: Battlefront: WWII Road to Victory
programmes.show_description: Bloody fighting erupts in the Gilbert Islands, a tiny Pacific archipelago, in November 1943.

programmes.show_name: New: Battlefront: WWII Road to Victory
programmes.show_description: Allied armies encounter German resistance in the Italian fishing town of Anzio.
Witness how Adolf Hitler, Heinrich Himmler, Herman Goring, Josef Goebbels and Rudolf Hess made their individual journeys through pre-war Germany.
Hitler inspired loyalty from his men; Goebbels, a master of propaganda; Himmler, architect of terror; and Goring, a military man who balanced tradition with modern ambition and luxury.
Examining the disintegration of Hitler's vision of terror and the outcomes of the horrors of the period, plus European and US reflection on not acting faster to prevent the atrocities.
Drama series. Kaz forms an alliance with Tina's Asian crew to help take Bea down, Jake reveals his true colours and Ferguson strikes again.
Drama series. Bea tries to discover who gave Allie an overdose. Ferguson leaves for her trial, confident of the outcome and with a dire warning for Bea.
Drama series. In the wake of Bea Smith's murder, the women are baying for Ferguson's blood. Vera takes unethical steps to cover her back, and Allie returns from hospital.
Drama series. Back in Wentworth, Franky discovers who framed her. Doreen learns that Liz is to give evidence against Sonia. Vera acts to undermine Ferguson.

Crime drama starring Peter Falk and Joyce Van Patten. Murder is a family business when siblings fall out over the future of their gallery. (1976)

programmes.show_name: Columbo: It's All in the Game
programmes.show_description: Detective drama starring Peter Falk and Faye Dunaway. The sleuth investigates the murder of a playboy gambler, but finds the dead man's girlfriend a distraction. (1993)

programmes.show_name: The Most Embarrassing Reality TV Moments
programmes.show_description: The toe-curling world of reality TV where tantrums and meltdowns are considered de rigueur, including Tiffany on Celebrity Big Brother, Rebecca Loos on The Farm and more!
When a police sergeant's wife is murdered, a list of names is found at their home linking a series of accidents. Taggart is left puzzled - who is really behind the killings?
